summary: Salesforce OAuth token storage — AES-256 encryption at rest
description_md:
OAuth tokens from Salesforce contain sensitive authentication credentials that must be protected at rest to meet enterprise security standards and comply with data protection regulations.

- **Encryption**: All OAuth access and refresh tokens must be encrypted using AES-256-GCM with unique per-tenant encryption keys
- **Performance**: Token encryption/decryption operations must complete within 50ms to maintain connector response time SLA of <200ms
- **Availability**: Encrypted token storage must achieve 99.9% availability with automatic failover between primary and replica storage nodes
- **Compliance**: Encryption implementation must support FIPS 140-2 Level 2 validated cryptographic modules for regulated tenants
- **Key Rotation**: Support automated encryption key rotation every 90 days with zero-downtime re-encryption of existing tenant tokens
